parts.text:
I need to deeply understand the implementation differences between Claude Code and OpenCode in this project. Read the following files COMPLETELY and return full content:

## Claude Code integration files:
1. `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` - plugin metadata
2. `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` - marketplace metadata
3. `commands/*.md` - read ALL 10 files completely
4. `.mcp.json` - ALL 4 MCP tool definitions
5. `hooks/hooks.json` - ALL hook definitions
6. `scripts/session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` - lifecycle hook script
7. `scripts/stop-review-gate-hook.mjs` - stop gate hook script

## OpenCode integration files:
1. `.opencode/package.json` - deps
2. `.opencode/tools/*.ts` - read ALL 9 files completely
3. `.opencode/commands/*.md` - read ALL 10 files completely
4. `.opencode/plugins/trae-hooks.ts` - event hooks plugin
5. `.opencode/node_modules/@opencode-ai/plugin/dist/index.d.ts` - TypeScript types
6. `.opencode/node_modules/@opencode-ai/plugin/dist/tool.d.ts` - tool types
7. `.claude-plugin/` directory contents

## Core shared code:
1. `src/index.ts` - CLI entrypoint
2. `AGENTS.md` - full architecture guide

Return ALL file contents completely. Do NOT summarize or skip. I need exact source code to write a deep technical article.
I'll read all the requested files in parallel to get the complete contents.

1: #!/usr/bin/env node
2: /**
3:  * session-lifecycle-hook.mjs
4:  * Handles SessionStart and SessionEnd events for trae-plugin-cc
5:  */
6: 
7: import { execSync } from 'child_process';
8: import { existsSync, readdirSync, statSync, unlinkSync, mkdirSync, appendFileSync } from 'fs';
9: import { join } from 'path';
10: import { homedir } from 'os';
11: import { getPluginDir, getRunningJobs } from './job-utils.mjs';
12: 
13: const HOME_BIN = join(homedir(), '.local', 'bin');
14: const CONFIG_FILE = join(homedir(), '.trae', 'trae_cli.yaml');
15: 
16: // Ensure ~/.local/bin is in PATH for trae-cli detection
17: (function ensurePath() {
18:   const existing = process.env.PATH || '';
19:   if (!existing.split(':').includes(HOME_BIN)) {
20:     process.env.PATH = `${HOME_BIN}:${existing}`;
21:   }
22: })();
23: 
24: function checkTraeCliInstalled() {
25:   // Use execSync only with fixed commands, no user input
26:   try {
27:     execSync('which trae-cli', { stdio: 'ignore' });
28:     return true;
29:   } catch {
30:     return false;
31:   }
32: }
33: 
34: function checkTraeConfig() {
35:   return existsSync(CONFIG_FILE);
36: }
37: 
38: function cleanupStaleLogs() {
39:   const pluginDir = getPluginDir();
40:   if (!existsSync(pluginDir)) return;
41: 
42:   const now = Date.now();
43:   const sevenDays = 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
44: 
45:   try {
46:     const files = readdirSync(pluginDir);
47:     const logs = files.filter(f => f.endsWith('.log'));
48: 
49:     for (const logFile of logs) {
50:       const logPath = join(pluginDir, logFile);
51:       const mtime = statSync(logPath).mtimeMs;
52:       if (now - mtime > sevenDays) {
53:         try {
54:           unlinkSync(logPath);
55:           const pidFile = logFile.replace('.log', '.pid');
56:           const pidPath = join(pluginDir, pidFile);
57:           if (existsSync(pidPath)) unlinkSync(pidPath);
58:         } catch {
59:           // Ignore cleanup errors
60:         }
61:       }
62:     }
63:   } catch {
64:     // Ignore errors
65:   }
66: }
67: 
68: async function sessionStart() {
69:   console.log('🔍 [Trae Plugin] Session Start Check');
70:   console.log('─'.repeat(40));
71: 
72:   const installed = checkTraeCliInstalled();
73:   const hasConfig = checkTraeConfig();
74: 
75:   if (installed && hasConfig) {
76:     console.log('✅ trae-cli 已安装并配置');
77:   } else {
78:     if (!installed) {
79:       console.log('⚠️  trae-cli 未安装');
80:     }
81:     if (!hasConfig) {
82:       console.log('⚠️  配置文件不存在');
83:     }
84:     console.log('\n运行 /trae:setup 进行初始化');
85:   }
86: 
87:   const running = getRunningJobs();
88:   if (running.length > 0) {
89:     console.log(`📋 后台任务: ${running.length} 个运行中`);
90:   }
91: 
92:   console.log('─'.repeat(40));
93: }
94: 
95: async function sessionEnd() {
96:   console.log('🔍 [Trae Plugin] Session End Cleanup');
97:   console.log('─'.repeat(40));
98: 
99:   cleanupStaleLogs();
100: 
101:   const running = getRunningJobs();
102:   if (running.length > 0) {
103:     console.log(`⚠️  有 ${running.length} 个后台任务仍在运行:`);
104:     for (const id of running) {
105:       console.log(`   - ${id}`);
106:     }
107:     console.log('使用 /trae:status 查看状态');
108:   } else {
109:     console.log('✅ 无运行中的任务');
110:   }
111: 
112:   console.log('─'.repeat(40));
113: }
114: 
115: async function postReview() {
116:   // Post-review hook: record review execution for tracking
117:   try {
118:     const pluginDir = getPluginDir();
119:     if (!existsSync(pluginDir)) {
120:       mkdirSync(pluginDir, { recursive: true });
121:     }
122: 
123:     const reviewLog = join(pluginDir, 'reviews.jsonl');
124:     const entry = JSON.stringify({
125:       timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
126:       event: 'PostReview',
127:       cwd: process.cwd(),
128:     }) + '\n';
129: 
130:     appendFileSync(reviewLog, entry);
131:     console.log('📝 审查记录已保存:', reviewLog);
132:   } catch (e) {
133:     console.error('⚠️  审查记录保存失败:', e.message);
134:   }
135:   process.exit(0);
136: }
137: 
138: // Main handler
139: const hookType = process.argv[2];
140: 
141: switch (hookType) {
142:   case 'SessionStart':
143:     sessionStart();
144:     break;
145:   case 'SessionEnd':
146:     sessionEnd();
147:     break;
148:   case 'PostReview':
149:     postReview();
150:     break;
151:   default:
152:     console.error('Unknown hook type:', hookType);
153:     process.exit(1);
154: }

(End of file - total 154 lines)
</content>

1: #!/usr/bin/env node
2: /**
3:  * stop-review-gate-hook.mjs
4:  * Optional review gate that prompts for review before stopping
5:  */
6: 
7: import { execSync } from 'child_process';
8: import { getRunningJobs } from './job-utils.mjs';
9: 
10: function hasUncommittedChanges() {
11:   try {
12:     // Check for staged, unstaged, and untracked changes
13:     const staged = execSync('git diff --cached --name-only', { encoding: 'utf-8' }).trim();
14:     if (staged) return true;
15: 
16:     const unstaged = execSync('git diff --name-only', { encoding: 'utf-8' }).trim();
17:     if (unstaged) return true;
18: 
19:     const untracked = execSync('git status --porcelain', { encoding: 'utf-8' }).trim();
20:     if (untracked) return true;
21: 
22:     return false;
23:   } catch {
24:     return false;
25:   }
26: }
27: 
28: async function stopGate() {
29:   const force = process.argv.includes('--force');
30: 
31:   if (force) {
32:     console.log('⏭️  [Trae Plugin] Stop gate bypassed (--force)');
33:     process.exit(0);
34:   }
35: 
36:   const hasChanges = hasUncommittedChanges();
37:   const runningJobs = getRunningJobs();
38: 
39:   if (!hasChanges && runningJobs.length === 0) {
40:     process.exit(0);
41:   }
42: 
43:   console.log('⚠️  [Trae Plugin] Stop Gate');
44:   console.log('─'.repeat(40));
45: 
46:   if (hasChanges) {
47:     console.log('📝 检测到未提交的代码变更');
48:     console.log('   建议在离开前运行 /trae:review 进行审查');
49:   }
50: 
51:   if (runningJobs.length > 0) {
52:     console.log(`📋 有 ${runningJobs.length} 个后台任务仍在运行`);
53:   }
54: 
55:   console.log('─'.repeat(40));
56:   console.log('使用 --force 参数可强制退出');
57: 
58:   process.exit(1);
59: }
60: 
61: stopGate();

(End of file - total 61 lines)

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import type { Plugin } from "@opencode-ai/plugin"
2: import path from "path"
3: 
4: const SCRIPTS_DIR = path.join(path.dirname(path.dirname(import.meta.dir)), "scripts")
5: 
6: function hookArgs(script: string, hookType: string): string[] {
7:   return ["node", path.join(SCRIPTS_DIR, script), hookType]
8: }
9: 
10: async function callHook(
11:   script: string,
12:   hookType: string,
13:   cwd: string,
14:   payload?: Record<string, unknown>,
15: ) {
16:   try {
17:     const proc = Bun.spawn(hookArgs(script, hookType), {
18:       cwd,
19:       stdout: "pipe",
20:       stderr: "pipe",
21:       stdin: payload ? new Blob([JSON.stringify(payload) + "\n"]) : undefined,
22:     })
23:     const stdout = await new Response(proc.stdout).text()
24:     const stderr = await new Response(proc.stderr).text()
25:     await proc.exited
26:     if (stdout) console.log(`[trae:${hookType}]`, stdout.trim())
27:     if (stderr) console.warn(`[trae:${hookType}]`, stderr.trim())
28:   } catch (e) {
29:     console.error(`[trae-hook:${hookType}]`, e)
30:   }
31: }
32: 
33: function callHookSync(
34:   script: string,
35:   hookType: string,
36:   cwd: string,
37:   payload?: Record<string, unknown>,
38: ) {
39:   try {
40:     const result = Bun.spawnSync(hookArgs(script, hookType), {
41:       cwd,
42:       stdout: "pipe",
43:       stderr: "pipe",
44:       stdin: payload ? new TextEncoder().encode(JSON.stringify(payload) + "\n") : undefined,
45:     })
46:     const stdout = new TextDecoder().decode(result.stdout)
47:     const stderr = new TextDecoder().decode(result.stderr)
48:     if (stdout) console.log(`[trae:${hookType}]`, stdout.trim())
49:     if (stderr) console.warn(`[trae:${hookType}]`, stderr.trim())
50:   } catch (e) {
51:     console.error(`[trae-hook-sync:${hookType}]`, e)
52:   }
53: }
54: 
55: /**
56:  * Trae Plugin hooks for OpenCode
57:  *
58:  * Maps Claude Code hooks to OpenCode events:
59:  * - SessionStart  → session.created
60:  * - Stop gate     → tool.execute.after (check uncommitted changes)
61:  * - PostReview    → tool.execute.after (review tools only)
62:  * - SessionEnd    → server.instance.disposed / session.deleted
63:  */
64: export const TraeHooksPlugin: Plugin = async ({ directory }) => {
65:   let currentSessionID: string | null = null
66: 
67:   return {
68:     event: async ({ event }) => {
69:       try {
70:         switch (event.type) {
71:           case "session.created": {
72:             const session = (event as any).properties?.info
73:             if (session?.id) {
74:               currentSessionID = session.id
75:               await callHook("session-lifecycle-hook.mjs", "SessionStart", directory, {
76:                 session_id: session.id,
77:               })
78:             }

1: # trae-plugin-cc — Agent Guide
2: 
3: ## What this does
4: 
5: A **dual-platform** plugin that delegates tasks to 字节 Trae Agent (`trae-cli`).
6: Works with both **Claude Code** and **OpenCode**.
7: 
8: | Platform | How it works |
9: |----------|-------------|
10: | **Claude Code** | Slash commands (`/trae:*`), MCP tools (`.mcp.json`), lifecycle hooks (`hooks/hooks.json`) |
11: | **OpenCode** | Bun tools (`.opencode/tools/*.ts`), command descriptions (`.opencode/commands/*.md`), event hooks (`.opencode/plugins/`) |
12: 
13: Both platforms share the same core CLI (`src/` → `dist/index.js`) and communicate with `trae-cli` via the same auth token.
14: 
15: ## Developer Commands
16: 
17: ### Claude Code / CLI
18: ```bash
19: npm run build      # bundle via esbuild (NOT tsc)
20: npm run build:tsc  # alternative: tsc only (rarely needed)
21: npm test           # jest, runs all tests/commands/*.test.ts
22: node dist/index.js <cmd> [args]  # run CLI directly
23: ```
24: 
25: ### OpenCode (Bun-based)
26: ```bash
27: cd .opencode && npm install && cd ..   # install plugin deps (once)
28: # No build needed for .opencode/tools/*.ts — Bun runs them directly
29: # BUT: src/ changes still require `npm run build` (tools invoke dist/index.js)
30: ```
31: 
32: **Build MUST use `npm run build`** (esbuild) — the dist/index.js output
33: includes a `#!/usr/bin/env node` shebang and is bundled with externals.
34: `tsc` output in dist/ is incomplete for production use.
35: 
36: ## Architecture in brief
37: 
38: ```
39: ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────┐
40: │             Claude Code                       │
41: │  commands/*.md     → slash command docs       │
42: │  .mcp.json         → 4 MCP tools              │
43: │  hooks/hooks.json  → SessionStart/End/Stop    │
44: ├───────────────────────────────────────────────┤
45: │             OpenCode                           │
46: │  .opencode/tools/*.ts    → 9 Bun tools        │
47: │  .opencode/commands/*.md → 10 command docs    │
48: │  .opencode/plugins/      → event hooks        │
49: ├───────────────────────────────────────────────┤
50: │             Core CLI (shared)                  │
51: │  src/commands/*.ts  → command handlers        │
52: │  src/utils/*.ts     → shared utilities        │
53: │  scripts/*.mjs      → hook scripts             │
54: │  ↓ compiled to dist/index.js (esbuild)        │
55: └───────────────────────────────────────────────┘
56:            ↓ spawns as child process
57:     trae-cli (OAuth2 authenticated)
58: ```
59: 
60: ## Key Commands / Internal Entrypoint
61: 
62: The single CLI entrypoint is `src/index.ts` → `dist/index.js`:
63: 
64: ```
65: trae-plugin-cc <command>
66:   setup              # check trae-cli install + auth
67:   run "prompt"       # delegate task to trae-cli
68:   review             # git diff + review
69:   adversarial-review # same but strict prompt
70:   sessions <action>  # list/detail/conversation/tools/context/find/delete/delete-smoke
71:   acp <action>       # start/stop/status/agents/run/stream (STDIO JSON-RPC, NOT HTTP)
72:   status             # background job listing
73:   result <job-id>    # read job log
74:   cancel <job-id>    # SIGKILL a background job
75:   rescue             # diagnose recent failures
76:   hooks <hook-type>  # internal (session-start/session-end/stop-gate)
77: ```
78: 
79: ## Runtime Dependencies
80: 
81: - **trae-cli** must be installed and authenticated (`~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml`)
82: - trae-cli may live in `~/.local/bin/` — PATH prepend logic exists in
83:   `src/utils/getTraeCliEnv`, `src/utils/auth-bridge.ts:buildSpawnEnv`,
84:   and `src/utils/acp-server-manager.ts`
85: - Sessions cached at `~/Library/Caches/trae_cli/sessions/` (macOS) or
86:   `~/.cache/trae_cli/sessions/` (Linux)
87: 
88: ## Testing Notes
89: 
90: - Jest + ts-jest, `testEnvironment: "node"`
91: - Tests mock `child_process`, `fs`, trae-executor
92: - `npm test` runs fast (~12s), tests all 5 test files
93: - No separate lint or typecheck scripts — rely on `npm run build`
94:   and `npm test`
95: 
96: ## Build → Test Order
97: 
98: ```bash
99: npm run build && npm test
100: ```
101: 
102: Run build before testing so dist/ matches src/.
103: 
104: ## ⚠️ CRITICAL: Always compile after changes
105: 
106: **You MUST run `npm run build` after ANY change to `src/` files before testing or verifying.**
107: 
108: The runtime entrypoint is `dist/index.js` (bundled via esbuild), NOT `src/index.ts`.
109: If you modify any `.ts` file in `src/` and immediately test with `node dist/index.js` or `dist/utils/*.js`, you will be running **stale code** because tsc (`npm run build:tsc`) and esbuild (`npm run build`) produce separate outputs:
110: 
111: | Command | Output | Used by |
112: |---------|--------|---------|
113: | `npm run build` | `dist/index.js` (bundled, with shebang) | **Runtime CLI** (`node dist/index.js`) |
114: | `npm run build:tsc` | `dist/**/*.js` (separate .js files) | Direct module imports (`require('dist/utils/*.js')`) |
115: 
116: **Rule of thumb: Always run `npm run build` before any verification.**
117: 
118: ## Directory Conventions
119: 
120: | Directory | Purpose |
121: |-----------|---------|
122: | `.claude-plugin/` | Claude Code plugin + marketplace manifest |
123: | `commands/` | Slash command `.md` files (user-facing docs) |
124: | `src/commands/` | TypeScript handlers for each CLI subcommand |
125: | `src/utils/` | Shared: TraeExecutor, SessionReader, AuthBridge, Acp*, etc. |
126: | `scripts/` | `.mjs` hook scripts — called by hooks.json, not by CLI |
127: | `.opencode/tools/` | OpenCode Bun tools (`export default tool({...})`), run directly by Bun |
128: | `.opencode/commands/` | OpenCode command descriptions (`.md` with Frontmatter) |
129: | `.opencode/plugins/` | OpenCode lifecycle hooks (event-driven, not hooks.json) |
130: | `.opencode/package.json` | OpenCode deps (`@opencode-ai/plugin`), managed separately |
131: | `.mcp.json` | 4 MCP tools for Claude Code |
132: | `hooks/hooks.json` | Claude Code lifecycle hook definitions |
133: | `tests/` | Jest test files |
134: 
135: ## OpenCode Tool → CLI Mapping
136: 
137: Each `.opencode/tools/*.ts` maps to a CLI subcommand via `spawn("node", [dist/index.js, cmd, ...args])`:
138: 
139: | OpenCode Tool | CLI Command | Notes |
140: |--------------|-------------|-------|
141: | `trae-setup` | `setup` | No args |
142: | `trae-run` | `run` | Supports all CLI flags (resume, yolo, worktree, etc.) |
143: | `trae-review` | `review` / `adversarial-review` | Uses `adversarial` boolean arg |
144: | `trae-sessions` | `sessions` | Supports all 9 actions including `delete-smoke` |
145: | `trae-acp` | `acp` | STDIO JSON-RPC, NOT HTTP server |
146: | `trae-status` | `status` | No args |
147: | `trae-result` | `result` | Requires `task_id` arg |
148: | `trae-cancel` | `cancel` | Requires `task_id` arg |
149: | `trae-rescue` | `rescue` | Optional `context` arg |
150: 
151: **Critical**: OpenCode tools call `dist/index.js`, so **any `src/` change requires `npm run build`** before the OpenCode tools pick it up.
152: 
153: ## Claude Code Integration Points
154: 
155: ### MCP Tools (4)
156: Defined in `.mcp.json`, auto-registered after plugin install:
157: | Tool | Description |
158: |------|-------------|
159: | `trae_run` | Execute natural language tasks |
160: | `trae_review` | Code review (auto-fetches git diff) |
161: | `trae_sessions` | Query historical sessions |
162: | `trae_acp` | ACP protocol management |
163: 
164: ### Slash Commands
165: Defined in `commands/*.md`, user-triggered with `/trae:*`:
166: `run`, `review`, `adversarial-review`, `sessions`, `acp`, `setup`, `status`, `result`, `cancel`, `rescue`
167: 
168: ### Lifecycle Hooks
169: Defined in `hooks/hooks.json`, auto-triggered:
170: | Hook | Script | Behavior |
171: |------|--------|----------|
172: | `SessionStart` | `scripts/session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` | Check trae-cli, remind bg tasks |
173: | `SessionEnd` | `scripts/session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` | Clean old logs, remind running tasks |
174: | `Stop` | `scripts/stop-review-gate-hook.mjs` | Gate on uncommitted changes |
175: | `PostToolUse` | `scripts/session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` | Log review results |
176: 
177: ## OpenCode Integration Points
178: 
179: ### Bun Tools (9)
180: Located in `.opencode/tools/*.ts`, exported as `export default tool({...})`.
181: Run directly by Bun — no compilation needed.
182: 
183: ### Command Descriptions (10)
184: Located in `.opencode/commands/*.md`, with Frontmatter `description:` header.
185: Agent-readable instructions for each command.
186: 
187: ### Event Hooks
188: Located in `.opencode/plugins/trae-hooks.ts`.
189: Maps OpenCode events (`session.created`, `session.deleted`, `server.instance.disposed`) to plugin hooks.
190: 
191: ## ACP Protocol Note
192: 
193: ACP uses **JSON-RPC over STDIO**, NOT an HTTP server.
194: `trae-cli acp serve` keeps stdin/stdout open for bidirectional JSON-RPC messages.
195: The `AcpClient` class writes JSON-RPC to stdin and reads responses from stdout.
196: Do NOT look for port numbers — there is no HTTP listener.

(End of file - total 196 lines)
</content>
